aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite ATS Mechanical due to decent content and authority signals, but gaps in structured data and conversational content limit their potential reach.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Enhance content with more conversational, long-tail queries relevant to AI search.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to specific HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema with HVAC-related questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on complex topics like VRF systems and energy efficiency.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, ATS Mechanical misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and conversational content appear more frequently in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, enhance conversational content, and actively manage GBP to align with AI search trends.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer ATS waits, the more ground they lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for ATS Mechanical: Act Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can drive more AI-driven leads to your business.
